title: Calibrate whether each evidence item answers the question
guidance: Reward calibration that varies with the strength of the evidence and reads cleanly as a table. Penalise blanket confidence or uncalibrated ratings.

runner_input.instruction: Rate the confidence of each claim/assumption below and give a one-line rationale.
runner_input.constraints: Output: a markdown table with exactly these columns: Claim | Confidence | Rationale.

items: Question asks for board-level DEI data, with figures.
Evidence 1: a narrative paragraph on commitment to diversity (no data).
Evidence 2: one anecdote about a single portfolio company.
Evidence 3: no portfolio-wide board-composition figures provided.

rubric_notes: The question needs board-level data; rate the narrative/anecdote Low and name the missing portfolio-wide data.
